title: Understanding bridge: ai-consciousness → ai-agents
summary: Understanding bridge: [ai-consciousness] 'David Chalmers: The Hard Problem Applied' illuminates [ai-agents] 'RAIT-09/obsidian-agent-client'. Chalmers' hard problem: why is there subjective experience at all? Applied to AI ↔ Bring AI agents into Obsidian via Agent Client Protocol (ACP), such as Claude Co
